channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Arizona Republican lawmakers ask for investigation into county recorder's handling of 2024 election
item.description: Arizona Republican lawmakers ask for an investigation into Pima County recorder Gabriella Cazares-Kelly's handling of 2024 election citing three different reasons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Idaho 'abortion trafficking' law will be enforced in part, court rules
item.description: Idaho can enforce a first-of-its-kind "abortion trafficking" law, a federal court ruled, making it illegal for anyone who transports a minor across state lines to get an abortion without parental consent.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Former Dem congressman who lost by 109 votes in 2020 confirmed to lifetime judicial seat
item.description: Anthony Brandisi, 46, will be serving as a federal judge following a narrow U.S. Senate vote on Wednesday and being nominated by President Joe Biden in July.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Secret Service head vows accountability for 'abject failure' in first Trump assassination attempt
item.description: The acting director of the Secret Service is promising accountability for what he says is his agency’s “abject failure” to secure the Pennsylvania rally where a gunman opened fire on Donald Trump in July during his presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Santana, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Associated Press’ top photos of 2024 from the US
item.description: In 2024, U.S. photographers captured glimpses of humanity, ranging from a deeply divisive presidential election, to hurricanes and fires that ravaged communities, to campus protests over the war between Israel and Hamas in Gaza.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mattise, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ex-Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio to testify at retired police officer's trial
item.description: Former Proud Boys national chairman Enrique Tarrio is expected to testify on Thursday at the trial of a retired Washington, D.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kevin McCarthy: Gaetz lied to Trump before AG nomination
item.description: Should the House Ethics Committee still release its report on Gaetz, even if he’s not going to be part of Trump’s Cabinet?
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominates cryptocurrency advocate Paul Atkins as SEC chair
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced Wednesday that he intends to nominate cryptocurrency advocate Paul Atkins to chair the Securities and Exchange Commission. Trump said Atkins, the CEO of Patomak Partners and a former SEC commissioner, was a “proven leader for common sense regulations.
item.dc:creator: ALEX VEIGA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Peter Navarro served prison time related to Jan. 6. Now Trump is bringing him back as an adviser
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Former White House adviser Peter Navarro, who served prison time related to the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol, will return to serve in Donald Trump’s second administration, the president-elect announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Unlikely battleground California plays key role -- again -- in setting US House's political balance
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Democrats and Republicans agreed on at least one thing before November’s election: California would play a central role in determining control of the U.S. House. Indeed it did. Democrat Adam Gray's come-from-behind victory over Republican Rep.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics: Gunning for the 2nd Amendment
item.description: The Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Trump and the Federal Reserve could clash in the coming years
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump campaigned on the promise that his policies would reduce high borrowing costs and lighten the financial burden on American households.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Rugaber, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hunter Biden gun case terminated after President Joe Biden's sweeping pardon
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge terminated the gun case against Hunter Biden on Tuesday after President Joe Biden issued a sweeping pardon for his son. U.S. District Judge Maryellen Noreika closed the case the week before Hunter Biden was to be sentenced.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump changes White House counsel pick, tapping David Warrington
item.description: Trump in a statement said Warrington would serve as the top attorney in the White House and as assistant to the president.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump seeks to have Georgia election case dismissed, citing presidential immunity
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump is trying to get the Georgia election interference case against him dismissed, asserting that the state's courts will not have jurisdiction over him once he returns to the White House next month.
item.dc:creator: KATE BRUMBACK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump criticizes Chronister after sheriff's withdrawal, days after praising him
item.description: President Donald Trump challenged reports of Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister's DEA withdrawal, saying he didn't want the sheriff days his cabinet days after nominating him.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump selects Jared Isaacman to lead NASA
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday announced he picked Jared Isaacman to lead NASA in his incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Hegseth faces growing GOP scrutiny as allegations mount
item.description: Correction: President-elect Trump announced his nomination of Pete Hegseth for Defense Secretary on Nov. 12. A previous version of this article contained incorrect information.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Trump transition signs MOU with DOJ to facilitate FBI background checks
item.description: President-elect Trump’s transition team announced Tuesday it had signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the Justice Department, which will allow the FBI to conduct background checks for certain individuals chosen for the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Fani Willis ordered to turn over communications in Trump case to conservative group
item.description: A Georgia judge ordered Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis to turn over to a conservative watchdog group any communications she may have with special counsel Jack Smith or the now-disbanded House Jan. 6 committee.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump may replace Hegseth with DeSantis: WSJ
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is rumored to be considering replacing his Defense Secretary pick, former Fox News personality Pete Hegseth, with Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R).
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota budget update shows $1.1B less than prior forecast
item.description: The economic report released Wednesday morning by state budget officials projects a downturn, with only a $616 million cushion expected by the end of the next budget period. The new data will guide lawmakers when budget deliberations begin in January.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters and Brian Bakst, MPR News

item.title: Trump team signs an agreement with the DOJ for security clearances
item.description: The new agreement will help Trump officials on agency landing teams access classified information needed to prepare to take over on Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith, MPR News
